notes: Ballistic ceramic Al2O3 SAPI-style plate. High hardness, low ductility. ~2.5x RHA per mm (ESAPI/ARL consensus). Previous 3.5 was B4C territory.

source.reference: ESAPI specification (US DoD), ARL ceramic armor consensus data
source.methodology: RHAe from ESAPI/ARL consensus on 99.5% Al2O3 SAPI-style plate performance vs AP threats. Based on published ESAPI Level IV certification requirements.
